This eliminates the need for a virtual DOM and results in smaller bundle sizes and faster runtime performance."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key Technologies:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vite"}]," as development server and build tool"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"O(1) hot reload"}]," that processes only changed files"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Filesystem-based routing"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"src/routes"}]," folder structure"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compile-time optimizations"}]," for maximum efficiency"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"nextjs-react-server-components--app-router","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#nextjs-react-server-components--app-router","className":"peer","children":"Next.js: React Server Components & App Router"}],["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}]],"$undefined"]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Next.js 13+ introduced the ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"App Router"}]," architecture built around ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"React Server Components (RSC)"}],". 5d:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Bottom Line:"}]," SvelteKit offers superior performance and developer experience with compile-time optimizations, while Next.js provides a mature ecosystem with extensive tooling. SvelteKit is simpler to learn and more efficiently designed, making it ideal for performance-critical applications and teams prioritizing developer experience."]}]
